subject: Pnf Spring Environment correction
commit_message:
Pnf Spring Environment correction

Change-Id: Ic9d83e2919bd1f947fdca07d8982bd5e794c9dbe
Issue-ID: SO-1102
Signed-off-by: Lukasz Muszkieta <lukasz.muszkieta@nokia.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

@Committers: This implementation fix was meant for casablanca release from the start. It is identical to what was merged on Monday to master. Because casablanca release had been branched out after this change was submitted, but after being merged to master, it has only ended up in Dublin.

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/so-casablanca-verify-java/11

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

It is needed for PnF usecase.
Change has been successfully merged by Seshu Kumar M
